notes: Scope is stated over the two quantifier forms Qx phi, Q in {forall, exists}, which are def:universal-q and def:existential-q (both present). The clause 'occurrences of x ... are bound' mentions boundness, but def:bound-free is standardly defined IN TERMS of scope, so an edge to def:bound-free would be backward (this node is its prerequisite) -- not proposed; the mention is explanatory.
